scripts.publish:dry-run: rm -rf .pack && mkdir -p .pack && (cd packages/contracts && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../.pack) && (cd packages/core && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../.pack) && (cd packages/metrics && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../.pack) && (cd packages/sdk && pnpm pack --pack-destination ../../.pack)
scripts.release:publish: cd packages/contracts && npm publish --access public && cd ../core && npm publish --access public && cd ../metrics && npm publish --access public && cd ../sdk && npm publish --access public
scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm integration && pnpm build && pnpm check:openapi
